title: drymonia ignea
intro: Drymonia ignea, also known as the fire-tongue, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Drymonia ignea include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
